input.background: An investigation into the possible effects on non-smokers of allowing smoking in a shared office environment.
input.question: Measured the lung capacity (in cubic metres) of the non-smokers before smoking was banned, and on the same staff a month after a ban on smoking had been enforced?

output.answer: Ideally a paired $t$ test would be employed (a Wilcoxon test could be used, but is more conservative when data are likely to be normally distributed).

meta_info.book: Using Statistics to Understand the Environment
